text:
In this subchapter:

(1) “Document” means information that is inscribed on a tangible medium or that is stored in an electronic or other medium and is retrievable in perceivable form.

(2) “Electronic” means relating to technology having electrical, digital, magnetic, wireless, optical, electromagnetic, or similar capabilities.

(3) “Electronic document” means a document that is in an electronic form.

(4) “Electronic signature” means an electronic sound, symbol, or process attached to or logically associated with a document and executed or adopted by a person with the intent to sign the document.

(5) “Paper document” means a document that is in printed form.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.172 — Definitions

In this subchapter:

    (1) “Document” means information that is inscribed on a tangible medium or that is stored in an electronic or other medium and is retrievable in perceivable form.

    (2) “Electronic” means relating to technology having electrical, digital, magnetic, wireless, optical, electromagnetic, or similar capabilities.

    (3) “Electronic document” means a document that is in an electronic form.

    (4) “Electronic signature” means an electronic sound, symbol, or process attached to or logically associated with a document and executed or adopted by a person with the intent to sign the document.

    (5) “Paper document” means a document that is in printed form.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 70, eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.text: “Document” means information that is inscribed on a tangible medium or that is stored in an electronic or other medium and is retrievable in perceivable form.
“Electronic” means relating to technology having electrical, digital, magnetic, wireless, optical, electromagnetic, or similar capabilities.
“Electronic document” means a document that is in an electronic form.
“Electronic signature” means an electronic sound, symbol, or process attached to or logically associated with a document and executed or adopted by a person with the intent to sign the document.
“Paper document” means a document that is in printed form.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 70, eff. January 1, 2012.
